name: mvp-codex-setup
description: Set up Codex for non-engineer MVP development with GitHub, Vercel, review rules, and project templates.

interface.shortDescription: Set up Codex, GitHub, Vercel, and review workflows for MVP development
interface.longDescription: A course plugin that helps non-engineer founders set up Codex for MVP development. It guides GitHub and Vercel connection, suggests MCP or app plugin setup, copies project templates, and establishes review and verification rules.
defaultPrompt: Set up this MVP repo for Codex
Connect GitHub and Vercel for this MVP
Add review rules for Codex development
